text.title: The 10 readiness items
text.summary: The canonical 10-item checklist. Each item is a binary tick with evidence link. Any unticked item blocks the in-progress → done transition.

rule.statement: All ACs from spec.md have evidence (test id or screenshot reference) linked next to the checkbox.
rule.rationale: An AC without a verifiable artefact is a claim, not a result. The link IS the audit trail.

rule.statement: All tasks moved to tasks/done/. tasks/todo/ and tasks/in-progress/ are empty.
rule.rationale: An unmoved task means work the developer thinks is irrelevant — explicit close-out exposes the assumption.

rule.statement: Commits are granular, follow `type(F0NN-T0N): ≤50 char title`, contain no Co-Authored-By line and no emoji.
rule.rationale: Granular history is the release-notes raw material. Forbidden trailers and emoji break the repo policy hook.

rule.statement: CI is green: lint + typecheck + unit tests all pass on the feature branch.
rule.rationale: Baseline machine check. Skipping it is the cheapest way to ship a regression.

rule.statement: API tests pass — REQUIRED ONLY when the feature touches backend.
rule.rationale: Backend surface changes break contracts silently if not contract-tested.

rule.statement: Playwright positive AND negative cases pass — REQUIRED ONLY when the feature has a user-facing flow.
rule.rationale: Positive only proves the happy path. Negative catches the unsexy edges where regressions hide.

rule.statement: ui-ux-design.md heuristics reviewed — REQUIRED ONLY when the feature touches UI.
rule.rationale: Heuristic audit catches affordance and feedback bugs before they reach the user.

rule.statement: project-spec/ delta is drafted in the same PR, OR readiness.md explicitly states "no spec impact" with a one-line reason.
rule.rationale: The same-PR rule from project-spec-structure. The escape hatch is loud on purpose.

rule.statement: Surface coupling reviewed: any new public surface (skill trigger, API path, CLI flag, exported name) has been checked against unrelated surfaces for accidental coupling.
rule.rationale: F001→F002 lesson — two unrelated features collided through skill description overlap. Item makes the review explicit.

rule.statement: Feature is deployed to the host listed in project-spec/deploy.md (per the deploy-after-feature memory rule).
rule.rationale: Done is "users can use it", not "the merge button was clicked". Closing the loop blocks ship-and-forget.
